session report…'}}];}if(cmd==='/evaluate'){const q=queryCommands[cmd];return[{json:{cmd_group:'query_agent',chat_id:chatId,webhook_url:q.webhook,label:q.label,ack_text:q.ack}}];}if(cmd==='/wiki'){if(!args.trim()){return[{json:{cmd_group:'query_agent',chat_id:chatId,webhook_url:'http://localhost:5678/webhook/wiki-run',label:'📡 Wiki Monitor',ack_text:'📡 Fetching Wikipedia attention data…'}}];}const wikiArgs=args.trim().toLowerCase();if(wikiArgs==='focus list'){return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:'📋 Fetching ignore list… (check Supabase wiki_monitor_config)'}}];}if(wikiArgs.startsWith('focus ')){const topic=args.trim().slice(6);return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:'👁 Added "'+topic+'" to focus list'}}];}if(wikiArgs.startsWith('ignore ')){const topic=args.trim().slice(7);return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:'🔇 Added "'+topic+'" to ignore list'}}];}if(wikiArgs.startsWith('sensitivity ')){const level=wikiArgs.slice(12).trim();return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:'⚙️ Sensitivity set to '+level}}];}return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:'📡 Checking attention on: '+args.trim()+'…'}}];}if(cmd==='/helpos'){return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:"📱 Claudis OS Commands

MONITORING
/status — system health check
/agents — agent registry
/errors — unresolved errors
/inbox — messages from Claudis
/activity — recent audit log
/queue — pending work queue
/outputs — recent agent outputs
/lessons — top lessons learned
/capabilities — what Claudis can do
/working — what Claudis is doing now
/summary — recent tasks + lessons (no wake needed)

DIRECTION
/build — exploratory build (Claudis chooses)
/build <desc> — deploy a specific agent
/research — self-directed research
/research <topic> — research a specific topic
/explore — free exploration session
/explore <topic> — directed exploration
/learning <topic> — learn a topic in depth
/task <instruction> — queue any task
/directive <instruction> — permanent standing order

INBOX
/approve <id> — approve a request
/deny <id> — deny a request
/reply <id> <msg> — reply to Claudis

INTELLIGENCE
/wiki — Wikipedia attention report
/wiki <topic> — attention data for any topic
/wiki focus <topic> — add to watch list
/wiki ignore <topic> — add to filter

SYSTEM
/awake — is Claudis running? what is it doing?
/wake — trigger immediate session
/pause — halt all activity
/resume — resume activity
/config <key> <value> — update system config
/helpos — show this command list

DIAGNOSTICS
/diagnose — quick health check (memory + stuck tasks)
/diagnose full — all 5 diagnostic categories
/diagnose schedule <daily|weekly|off> — set auto-diagnostic schedule

GITHUB
/gh_status — last commit + open branches + BECOMING
/gh_becoming — full BECOMING.md
/gh_attempts — open attempt branches
/gh_log [n] — last n commits (default 10)
/gh_review <branch> — branch commit history
/gh_keep <branch> — tag as signal:keep
/gh_redirect <note> — add aspiration to BECOMING.md
/gh_close <branch>[|note] — close attempt with note
/gh_task <text> — create GitHub Issue + queue as directive
/gh_pause [reason] — pause Claudis with note
/gh_report [n] — raw session artifacts (default 5)

AGENT CONTROL
/agents_all — all agents by status
/agents_sandbox — sandbox agents only
/test_agent <name> — trigger sandbox agent test
/promote_agent <name> — promote sandbox to production
/retire_agent <name> — retire an agent
/pause_agent <name> — pause active agent
/activate_agent <name> — activate paused agent"}}];}const monitorMap={'/status':{ack:'📊 Checking system status…',url:'STATUS_SPECIAL',fmt:'status'},'/agents':{ack:'🤖 Loading agent registry…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/agent_registry?select=agent_name,status,protected,updated_at&order=protected.desc,status.asc,agent_name.asc`,fmt:'agents'},'/errors':{ack:'🔴 Checking error log…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/error_logs?resolved=eq.false&order=timestamp.desc&limit=5&select=workflow_name,error_type,error_message,timestamp`,fmt:'errors'},'/inbox':{ack:'📬 Opening inbox…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/inbox?status=eq.pending&order=priority.desc,created_at.asc&select=id,from_agent,message_type,subject,priority,created_at`,fmt:'inbox'},'/activity':{ack:'📋 Loading activity…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/audit_log?order=timestamp.desc&limit=20&select=timestamp,action,actor,target`,fmt:'activity'},'/queue':{ack:'🗂️ Checking work queue…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/work_queue?select=id,task_type,status,priority,input_data,created_at&order=priority.desc,created_at.asc&limit=10`,fmt:'queue'},'/outputs':{ack:'📤 Loading recent outputs…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/experimental_outputs?order=created_at.desc&limit=10&select=agent_name,output_type,content,confidence,created_at`,fmt:'outputs'},'/lessons':{ack:'📚 Loading lessons…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/lessons_learned?select=title,category,confidence,times_applied&order=confidence.desc,times_applied.desc&limit=10`,fmt:'lessons'},'/capabilities':{ack:'⚡ Loading capabilities…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/capabilities?select=name,category,confidence,times_used&order=times_used.desc,confidence.desc&limit=10`,fmt:'capabilities'},'/agents_all':{ack:'🤖 Loading all agents…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/agent_registry?select=agent_name,status,description,created_at&order=status.asc,created_at.desc`,fmt:'agents'},'/agents_sandbox':{ack:'🧪 Loading sandbox agents…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/agent_registry?select=agent_name,description,workflow_id,created_at&status=eq.sandbox&order=created_at.desc`,fmt:'agents'},'/awake':{ack:'🟢 Checking Claudis presence…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/system_config?key=in.(claudis_current_task,claudis_heartbeat_at,claudis_session_start,global_pause)&select=key,value`,fmt:'awake'},'/working':{ack:'⚙️ Checking recent activity…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/work_queue?select=task_type,status,input_data,claimed_at,completed_at,output_data&or=(status.eq.claimed,status.eq.complete)&order=claimed_at.desc&limit=5`,fmt:'queue'},'/summary':{ack:'📋 Loading activity summary…',url:'STATUS_SPECIAL',fmt:'summary'}};if(cmd.startsWith('/gh_')&&cmd!=='/gh_pause'){const ghCmd=cmd.slice(1);const ghArgs=encodeURIComponent(args.trim());const ackMap={'/gh_status':'📂 Loading GitHub status…','/gh_becoming':'📖 Loading BECOMING…','/gh_attempts':'🌿 Loading attempt branches…','/gh_log':'📋 Loading commit log…','/gh_review':'🔍 Loading branch review…','/gh_keep':'✅ Tagging for keep…','/gh_redirect':'📝 Recording aspiration…','/gh_close':'🗃️ Closing attempt…','/gh_report':'📊 Generating session report…'};const ack=ackMap[cmd]||'📂 Running GitHub command…';return[{json:{cmd_group:'monitoring',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ack,query_url:`http://host.docker.internal:9100/gh?cmd=${ghCmd}&args=${ghArgs}`,fmt:'gh'}}];}if(monitorMap[cmd]){const m=monitorMap[cmd];return[{json:{cmd_group:'monitoring',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:m.ack,query_url:m.url,fmt:m.fmt}}];}if(cmd==='/explore'){const ackText=args?`🔭 Directed exploration queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`:'🔭 Exploration session queued. Claudis will go exploring on next wake.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}if(cmd==='/research'){const ackText=args?`🔬 Research queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`:'🔬 Self-directed research queued. Claudis will choose a topic and investigate on next wake.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}if(cmd==='/build'){const ackText=args?`🔨 Build request queued: ${args}. Claudis will build, wire the Telegram command, and notify you when live.`:'🔨 Exploratory build queued. Claudis will choose something to build on next wake.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}if(cmd==='/diagnose'){const mode=args.trim()==='full'?'full':args.trim().startsWith('schedule')?'schedule':'quick';const ackText=mode==='full'?'🔬 Full diagnostic queued (5 categories) — report in ~5 min.':mode==='schedule'?'⚙️ Diagnostic schedule set to: '+args.trim().split(' ')[1]:'🩺 Quick diagnostic queued — report in ~2 min.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}const writeAcks={'/gh_task':'📋 Creating GitHub Issue…','/gh_pause':'⏸️ Pausing Claudis…','/test_agent':'🧪 Queuing agent test…','/promote_agent':'🚀 Queuing promotion…','/retire_agent':'🗃️ Queuing retirement…','/pause_agent':'⏸️ Queuing pause…','/activate_agent':'▶️ Queuing activation…','/directive':'📌 Recording directive…','/task':'✅ Queueing task…'};if(writeAcks[cmd]){return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:writeAcks[cmd]}}];}if(cmd==='/approve'||cmd==='/deny'||cmd==='/reply'){const inboxAcks={'/approve':'✅ Processing approval…','/deny':'❌ Recording denial…','/reply':'💬 Delivering reply…'};return[{json:{cmd_group:'inbox_action',command:cmd,id_prefix:parts[1]||'',reply_msg:parts.slice(2).join(' '),chat_id:chatId,ack_text:inboxAcks[cmd]}}];}if(cmd==='/agent'||text.toLowerCase().includes('make agent')){let req=cmd==='/agent'?args:text;if(!req)req=text;const lower=req.toLowerCase();let pri=1;if(lower.includes('urgent')||lower.includes('fix'))pri=3;else if(lower.includes('today')||lower.includes('asap'))pri=2;return[{json:{cmd_group:'agent_request',chat_id:chatId,request_text:req,priority:pri,ack_text:'Got it — adding to work queue now.'}}];}return[];

const pc=$('Parse Command').item.json;const cmd=pc.command;const fmt=pc.fmt;const chatId=pc.chat_id;const queryUrl=pc.query_url;const useMgmtApi=cmd==='/status'||cmd==='/summary';let sql;if(cmd==='/summary'){sql=`SELECT row_type,name,extra,ts FROM (SELECT 'task' as row_type,task_type as name,'' as extra,COALESCE(completed_at,created_at)::text as ts FROM work_queue WHERE status='complete' ORDER BY completed_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5) t UNION ALL SELECT row_type,name,extra,ts FROM (SELECT 'lesson' as row_type,title as name,category as extra,created_at::text as ts FROM lessons_learned ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3) l`;}else{sql=`SELECT (SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='global_pause') as global_pause, (SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='sentinel_version') as sentinel_version, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM work_queue WHERE status='pending') as wq_pending, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM error_logs WHERE resolved=false) as errors_unresolved, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_registry WHERE protected=true) as agents_protected, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_registry WHERE protected=false) as agents_unprotected, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM inbox WHERE status='pending') as inbox_pending, (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM audit_log) as last_audit_at`;}return[{json:{is_status:useMgmtApi,fmt,chat_id:chatId,query_url:queryUrl,sql}}];

const pc=$('Parse Command').item.json;const cmd=pc.command;const args=pc.args||'';const chatId=pc.chat_id;const SBURL='https://cihbfubghytzqrpffgcq.supabase.co/rest/v1';if(cmd==='/explore'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(!args.trim()){body={task_type:'explore',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'free',instruction:'Self-directed exploration session. No specific task. Research something interesting, build a practice agent in the sandbox, or investigate a capability you want to develop. Document what you discover. Write lessons as you go. End the session by sending Bill a Telegram message describing what you explored and what you learned — not just what you built, but what you understood differently afterward.',constraints:['Write only to experimental_outputs and sandbox tables','Do not modify protected agents or architecture','Send Bill a Telegram summary when done']}};confirmText='🔭 Exploration session queued. Claudis will go exploring on next wake.';}else{body={task_type:'explore',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'directed',topic:args,instruction:`Explore ${args} with genuine curiosity. Research it, experiment with it, build something small to test your understanding. Document findings in ChromaDB and lessons_learned. Send Bill a Telegram summary of what you discovered.`}};confirmText=`🔭 Directed exploration queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(cmd==='/research'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(!args.trim()){body={task_type:'research_cycle',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'free',instruction:'Self-directed research session. Review your lessons_learned, capabilities, and ChromaDB collections to identify a gap in your knowledge that would make you more useful to Bill. Research it thoroughly. Document findings in research_topics and ChromaDB. Write at least one new lesson. Send Bill a Telegram summary of what you investigated and what you now understand that you did not before.',constraints:['Prefer Haiku for bulk research to stay within budget','Store findings in ChromaDB research collection','Check research_topics first to avoid duplication']}};confirmText='🔬 Self-directed research queued. Claudis will choose a topic and investigate on next wake.';}else{body={task_type:'research_cycle',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'directed',topic:args,instruction:`Research ${args} thoroughly. Find multiple sources. Identify patterns, controversies, and open questions. Store structured findings in research_topics and ChromaDB. Send Bill a Telegram summary when done.`}};confirmText=`🔬 Research queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(cmd==='/build'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(!args.trim()){body={task_type:'agent_build',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'free',telegram_command:false,instruction:'Exploratory build session. Review capabilities and lessons_learned to identify something worth building as a practice exercise — something you have not done before or want to get better at. Build in the sandbox only. Write to experimental_outputs. Document what you learned in lessons_learned and capabilities. Send Bill a Telegram summary describing what you built and what building it taught you.',constraints:['Sandbox only — experimental_outputs, no production tables','No Telegram command wiring required','Focus on learning, not deployment']}};confirmText='🔨 Exploratory build queued. Claudis will choose something to build on next wake.';}else{body={task_type:'agent_build',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'directed',description:args,telegram_command:true,requirements:['Build a working n8n workflow implementing the functionality','Wire up a Telegram command in the Telegram Command Agent routing','Test the full pipeline end to end','Send Bill a Telegram message confirming the agent is live and what command to use','Register in agent_registry as active with telegram_command populated']}};confirmText=`🔨 Build request queued: ${args}. Claudis will build, wire the Telegram command, and notify you when live.`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(['/test_agent','/promote_agent','/retire_agent','/pause_agent','/activate_agent'].includes(cmd)){const agentName=args.trim();if(!agentName){return[{json:{url:'',body:{},chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'⚠️ Usage: '+cmd+' <agent_name>'}}];}const actionMap={'/test_agent':{task_type:'agent_test',ack:'🧪 Test queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'},'/promote_agent':{task_type:'agent_promote',ack:'🚀 Promotion queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'},'/retire_agent':{task_type:'agent_retire',ack:'🗃️ Retirement queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'},'/pause_agent':{task_type:'agent_control',ack:'⏸️ Pause queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'},'/activate_agent':{task_type:'agent_control',ack:'▶️ Activation queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'}};const action=actionMap[cmd];const inputData=cmd==='/pause_agent'?{agent_name:agentName,action:'pause'}:cmd==='/activate_agent'?{agent_name:agentName,action:'activate'}:{agent_name:agentName};const body={task_type:action.task_type,status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:inputData};try{await fetch('http://host.docker.internal:9100/trigger_sentinel');}catch(e){}return[{json:{url:`${SBURL}/work_queue`,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:action.ack}}];}if(cmd==='/gh_task'){const text=args.trim();if(!text){return[{json:{url:'',body:{},chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'⚠️ Usage: /gh_task <description>'}}];}const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;const body={task_type:'gh_task',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{text}};try{await fetch('http://host.docker.internal:9100/trigger_sentinel');}catch(e){}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'📋 Queued as gh_task — Claudis will create the GitHub Issue and queue as directive.'}}];}if(cmd==='/gh_pause'){const note=args.trim()||'Paused via Telegram /gh_pause';const url=`${SBURL}/system_config?key=eq.global_pause`;const body={value:'true',updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),note};return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'⏸️ Claudis paused. All sessions halted until /resume.

Reason: '+note.slice(0,100)}}];}if(cmd==='/gh_report'){const n=args.trim().match(/^\d+$/)?parseInt(args.trim()):5;const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;const body={task_type:'gh_report',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{n}};return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:`📊 Report queued — Claudis will synthesize the last ${n} sessions.`}}];}if(cmd==='/diagnose'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(args.trim()==='full'){body={task_type:'self_diagnostic',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'full'}};confirmText='🔬 Full diagnostic queued (5 categories) — report in ~5 min.';}else if(args.trim().startsWith('schedule')){const freq=args.trim().split(' ')[1]||'';body={task_type:'self_diagnostic',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'schedule',frequency:freq}};confirmText='⚙️ Diagnostic schedule set to: '+(freq||'(cleared)');}else{body={task_type:'self_diagnostic',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'quick'}};confirmText='🩺 Quick diagnostic queued — report in ~2 min.';}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(!args.trim()){const usage={'/directive':'<instruction>','/task':'<description>'};return[{json:{url:null,body:null,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:`⚠️ Usage: ${cmd} ${usage[cmd]||'<text>'}`}}];}let url,body,confirmText;if(cmd==='/directive'){url=`${SBURL}/directives`;body={content:args,priority:3,source:'bill',status:'active',active:true};confirmText=`📌 Directive recorded:
"${args.slice(0,120)}"`;} else if(cmd==='/task'){url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;body={task_type:'general_task',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{request:args,source:'telegram'}};confirmText=`✅ Task queued:
"${args.slice(0,120)}"`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];

const pc=$('Parse Command').item.json;const cmd=pc.command;const idPrefix=pc.id_prefix||'';const replyMsg=pc.reply_msg||'';const chatId=pc.chat_id;const SBURL='https://cihbfubghytzqrpffgcq.supabase.co/rest/v1';const now=new Date().toISOString();if(!idPrefix){const usage={'/approve':'<id>','/deny':'<id>','/reply':'<id> <message>'};return[{json:{url:null,patch_body:null,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:`\u26a0\ufe0f Usage: ${cmd} ${usage[cmd]||'<id>'}`,needs_wq:false,wq_body:null}}];}const url=`${SBURL}/inbox?id=like.${idPrefix}%25`;let patchBody,confirmText,needsWq=false,wqBody=null;if(cmd==='/approve'){patchBody={status:'approved',responded_at:now};confirmText=`\u2705 Approved (${idPrefix}).\nQueued for next Sentinel wake.`;needsWq=true;wqBody={task_type:'approved_action',status:'pending',priority:3,input_data:{inbox_id_prefix:idPrefix,source:'bill_approval',note:'Execute approved inbox item on next wake'}};}else if(cmd==='/deny'){patchBody={status:'denied',responded_at:now};confirmText=`\u274c Denied (${idPrefix}).`;}else if(cmd==='/reply'){if(!replyMsg)return[{json:{url:null,patch_body:null,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'\u26a0\ufe0f Usage: /reply <id> <message>',needs_wq:false,wq_body:null}}];patchBody={status:'replied',bill_reply:replyMsg,responded_at:now};confirmText=`\ud83d\udcac Reply delivered (${idPrefix}).`;}return[{json:{url,patch_body:patchBody,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText,needs_wq:needsWq,wq_body:wqBody}}];

Checking attention on: '+args.trim()+'…'}}];}if(cmd==='/helpos'){return[{json:{cmd_group:'instant_reply',chat_id:chatId,ack_text:"📱 Claudis OS Commands

MONITORING
/status — system health check
/agents — agent registry
/errors — unresolved errors
/inbox — messages from Claudis
/activity — recent audit log
/queue — pending work queue
/outputs — recent agent outputs
/lessons — top lessons learned
/capabilities — what Claudis can do
/working — what Claudis is doing now
/summary — recent tasks + lessons (no wake needed)

DIRECTION
/build — exploratory build (Claudis chooses)
/build <desc> — deploy a specific agent
/research — self-directed research
/research <topic> — research a specific topic
/explore — free exploration session
/explore <topic> — directed exploration
/learning <topic> — learn a topic in depth
/task <instruction> — queue any task
/directive <instruction> — permanent standing order

INBOX
/approve <id> — approve a request
/deny <id> — deny a request
/reply <id> <msg> — reply to Claudis

INTELLIGENCE
/wiki — Wikipedia attention report
/wiki <topic> — attention data for any topic
/wiki focus <topic> — add to watch list
/wiki ignore <topic> — add to filter

SYSTEM
/awake — is Claudis running? what is it doing?
/wake — trigger immediate session
/pause — halt all activity
/resume — resume activity
/config <key> <value> — update system config
/helpos — show this command list

DIAGNOSTICS
/diagnose — quick health check (memory + stuck tasks)
/diagnose full — all 5 diagnostic categories
/diagnose schedule <daily|weekly|off> — set auto-diagnostic schedule

GITHUB
/gh_status — last commit + open branches + BECOMING
/gh_becoming — full BECOMING.md
/gh_attempts — open attempt branches
/gh_log [n] — last n commits (default 10)
/gh_review <branch> — branch commit history
/gh_keep <branch> — tag as signal:keep
/gh_redirect <note> — add aspiration to BECOMING.md
/gh_close <branch>[|note] — close attempt with note
/gh_task <text> — create GitHub Issue + queue as directive
/gh_pause [reason] — pause Claudis with note
/gh_report [n] — raw session artifacts (default 5)

AGENT CONTROL
/agents_all — all agents by status
/agents_sandbox — sandbox agents only
/test_agent <name> — trigger sandbox agent test
/promote_agent <name> — promote sandbox to production
/retire_agent <name> — retire an agent
/pause_agent <name> — pause active agent
/activate_agent <name> — activate paused agent"}}];}const monitorMap={'/status':{ack:'📊 Checking system status…',url:'STATUS_SPECIAL',fmt:'status'},'/agents':{ack:'🤖 Loading agent registry…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/agent_registry?select=agent_name,status,protected,updated_at&order=protected.desc,status.asc,agent_name.asc`,fmt:'agents'},'/errors':{ack:'🔴 Checking error log…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/error_logs?resolved=eq.false&order=timestamp.desc&limit=5&select=workflow_name,error_type,error_message,timestamp`,fmt:'errors'},'/inbox':{ack:'📬 Opening inbox…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/inbox?status=eq.pending&order=priority.desc,created_at.asc&select=id,from_agent,message_type,subject,priority,created_at`,fmt:'inbox'},'/activity':{ack:'📋 Loading activity…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/audit_log?order=timestamp.desc&limit=20&select=timestamp,action,actor,target`,fmt:'activity'},'/queue':{ack:'🗂️ Checking work queue…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/work_queue?select=id,task_type,status,priority,input_data,created_at&order=priority.desc,created_at.asc&limit=10`,fmt:'queue'},'/outputs':{ack:'📤 Loading recent outputs…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/experimental_outputs?order=created_at.desc&limit=10&select=agent_name,output_type,content,confidence,created_at`,fmt:'outputs'},'/lessons':{ack:'📚 Loading lessons…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/lessons_learned?select=title,category,confidence,times_applied&order=confidence.desc,times_applied.desc&limit=10`,fmt:'lessons'},'/capabilities':{ack:'⚡ Loading capabilities…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/capabilities?select=name,category,confidence,times_used&order=times_used.desc,confidence.desc&limit=10`,fmt:'capabilities'},'/agents_all':{ack:'🤖 Loading all agents…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/agent_registry?select=agent_name,status,description,created_at&order=status.asc,created_at.desc`,fmt:'agents'},'/agents_sandbox':{ack:'🧪 Loading sandbox agents…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/agent_registry?select=agent_name,description,workflow_id,created_at&status=eq.sandbox&order=created_at.desc`,fmt:'agents'},'/awake':{ack:'🟢 Checking Claudis presence…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/system_config?key=in.(claudis_current_task,claudis_heartbeat_at,claudis_session_start,global_pause)&select=key,value`,fmt:'awake'},'/working':{ack:'⚙️ Checking recent activity…',url:`${SBURL}/rest/v1/work_queue?select=task_type,status,input_data,claimed_at,completed_at,output_data&or=(status.eq.claimed,status.eq.complete)&order=claimed_at.desc&limit=5`,fmt:'queue'},'/summary':{ack:'📋 Loading activity summary…',url:'STATUS_SPECIAL',fmt:'summary'}};if(cmd.startsWith('/gh_')&&cmd!=='/gh_pause'){const ghCmd=cmd.slice(1);const ghArgs=encodeURIComponent(args.trim());const ackMap={'/gh_status':'📂 Loading GitHub status…','/gh_becoming':'📖 Loading BECOMING…','/gh_attempts':'🌿 Loading attempt branches…','/gh_log':'📋 Loading commit log…','/gh_review':'🔍 Loading branch review…','/gh_keep':'✅ Tagging for keep…','/gh_redirect':'📝 Recording aspiration…','/gh_close':'🗃️ Closing attempt…','/gh_report':'📊 Generating session report…'};const ack=ackMap[cmd]||'📂 Running GitHub command…';return[{json:{cmd_group:'monitoring',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ack,query_url:`http://host.docker.internal:9100/gh?cmd=${ghCmd}&args=${ghArgs}`,fmt:'gh'}}];}if(monitorMap[cmd]){const m=monitorMap[cmd];return[{json:{cmd_group:'monitoring',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:m.ack,query_url:m.url,fmt:m.fmt}}];}if(cmd==='/explore'){const ackText=args?`🔭 Directed exploration queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`:'🔭 Exploration session queued. Claudis will go exploring on next wake.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}if(cmd==='/research'){const ackText=args?`🔬 Research queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`:'🔬 Self-directed research queued. Claudis will choose a topic and investigate on next wake.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}if(cmd==='/build'){const ackText=args?`🔨 Build request queued: ${args}. Claudis will build, wire the Telegram command, and notify you when live.`:'🔨 Exploratory build queued. Claudis will choose something to build on next wake.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}if(cmd==='/diagnose'){const mode=args.trim()==='full'?'full':args.trim().startsWith('schedule')?'schedule':'quick';const ackText=mode==='full'?'🔬 Full diagnostic queued (5 categories) — report in ~5 min.':mode==='schedule'?'⚙️ Diagnostic schedule set to: '+args.trim().split(' ')[1]:'🩺 Quick diagnostic queued — report in ~2 min.';return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:ackText}}];}const writeAcks={'/gh_task':'📋 Creating GitHub Issue…','/gh_pause':'⏸️ Pausing Claudis…','/test_agent':'🧪 Queuing agent test…','/promote_agent':'🚀 Queuing promotion…','/retire_agent':'🗃️ Queuing retirement…','/pause_agent':'⏸️ Queuing pause…','/activate_agent':'▶️ Queuing activation…','/directive':'📌 Recording directive…','/task':'✅ Queueing task…'};if(writeAcks[cmd]){return[{json:{cmd_group:'write_command',command:cmd,args,chat_id:chatId,ack_text:writeAcks[cmd]}}];}if(cmd==='/approve'||cmd==='/deny'||cmd==='/reply'){const inboxAcks={'/approve':'✅ Processing approval…','/deny':'❌ Recording denial…','/reply':'💬 Delivering reply…'};return[{json:{cmd_group:'inbox_action',command:cmd,id_prefix:parts[1]||'',reply_msg:parts.slice(2).join(' '),chat_id:chatId,ack_text:inboxAcks[cmd]}}];}if(cmd==='/agent'||text.toLowerCase().includes('make agent')){let req=cmd==='/agent'?args:text;if(!req)req=text;const lower=req.toLowerCase();let pri=1;if(lower.includes('urgent')||lower.includes('fix'))pri=3;else if(lower.includes('today')||lower.includes('asap'))pri=2;return[{json:{cmd_group:'agent_request',chat_id:chatId,request_text:req,priority:pri,ack_text:'Got it — adding to work queue now.'}}];}return[];

const pc=$('Parse Command').item.json;const cmd=pc.command;const fmt=pc.fmt;const chatId=pc.chat_id;const queryUrl=pc.query_url;const useMgmtApi=cmd==='/status'||cmd==='/summary';let sql;if(cmd==='/summary'){sql=`SELECT row_type,name,extra,ts FROM (SELECT 'task' as row_type,task_type as name,'' as extra,COALESCE(completed_at,created_at)::text as ts FROM work_queue WHERE status='complete' ORDER BY completed_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5) t UNION ALL SELECT row_type,name,extra,ts FROM (SELECT 'lesson' as row_type,title as name,category as extra,created_at::text as ts FROM lessons_learned ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3) l`;}else{sql=`SELECT (SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='global_pause') as global_pause, (SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='sentinel_version') as sentinel_version, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM work_queue WHERE status='pending') as wq_pending, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM error_logs WHERE resolved=false) as errors_unresolved, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_registry WHERE protected=true) as agents_protected, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_registry WHERE protected=false) as agents_unprotected, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM inbox WHERE status='pending') as inbox_pending, (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM audit_log) as last_audit_at`;}return[{json:{is_status:useMgmtApi,fmt,chat_id:chatId,query_url:queryUrl,sql}}];

const pc=$('Parse Command').item.json;const cmd=pc.command;const args=pc.args||'';const chatId=pc.chat_id;const SBURL='https://cihbfubghytzqrpffgcq.supabase.co/rest/v1';if(cmd==='/explore'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(!args.trim()){body={task_type:'explore',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'free',instruction:'Self-directed exploration session. No specific task. Research something interesting, build a practice agent in the sandbox, or investigate a capability you want to develop. Document what you discover. Write lessons as you go. Claudis will go exploring on next wake.';}else{body={task_type:'explore',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'directed',topic:args,instruction:`Explore ${args} with genuine curiosity. Send Bill a Telegram summary of what you discovered.`}};confirmText=`🔭 Directed exploration queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(cmd==='/research'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(!args.trim()){body={task_type:'research_cycle',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'free',instruction:'Self-directed research session. Send Bill a Telegram summary of what you investigated and what you now understand that you did not before.',constraints:['Prefer Haiku for bulk research to stay within budget','Store findings in ChromaDB research collection','Check research_topics first to avoid duplication']}};confirmText='🔬 Self-directed research queued. Claudis will choose a topic and investigate on next wake.';}else{body={task_type:'research_cycle',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'directed',topic:args,instruction:`Research ${args} thoroughly. Find multiple sources. Identify patterns, controversies, and open questions. Store structured findings in research_topics and ChromaDB. Send Bill a Telegram summary when done.`}};confirmText=`🔬 Research queued: ${args}. Claudis will investigate on next wake.`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(cmd==='/build'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(!args.trim()){body={task_type:'agent_build',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'free',telegram_command:false,instruction:'Exploratory build session. Review capabilities and lessons_learned to identify something worth building as a practice exercise — something you have not done before or want to get better at. Build in the sandbox only. Write to experimental_outputs. Document what you learned in lessons_learned and capabilities. Send Bill a Telegram summary describing what you built and what building it taught you.',constraints:['Sandbox only — experimental_outputs, no production tables','No Telegram command wiring required','Focus on learning, not deployment']}};confirmText='🔨 Exploratory build queued. Claudis will choose something to build on next wake.';}else{body={task_type:'agent_build',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'directed',description:args,telegram_command:true,requirements:['Build a working n8n workflow implementing the functionality','Wire up a Telegram command in the Telegram Command Agent routing','Test the full pipeline end to end','Send Bill a Telegram message confirming the agent is live and what command to use','Register in agent_registry as active with telegram_command populated']}};confirmText=`🔨 Build request queued: ${args}. Claudis will build, wire the Telegram command, and notify you when live.`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(['/test_agent','/promote_agent','/retire_agent','/pause_agent','/activate_agent'].includes(cmd)){const agentName=args.trim();if(!agentName){return[{json:{url:'',body:{},chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'⚠️ Usage: '+cmd+' <agent_name>'}}];}const actionMap={'/test_agent':{task_type:'agent_test',ack:'🧪 Test queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'},'/promote_agent':{task_type:'agent_promote',ack:'🚀 Promotion queued for '+agentName+' — waking Claudis.'},'/retire_agent':{task_type:'agent_retire',ack:'🗃️ inputData=cmd==='/pause_agent'?{agent_name:agentName,action:'pause'}:cmd==='/activate_agent'?{agent_name:agentName,action:'activate'}:{agent_name:agentName};const body={task_type:action.task_type,status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:inputData};try{await fetch('http://host.docker.internal:9100/trigger_sentinel');}catch(e){}return[{json:{url:`${SBURL}/work_queue`,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:action.ack}}];}if(cmd==='/gh_task'){const directive.'}}];}if(cmd==='/gh_pause'){const note=args.trim()||'Paused via Telegram /gh_pause';const url=`${SBURL}/system_config?key=eq.global_pause`;const body={value:'true',updated_at:new All sessions halted until /resume.

Reason: '+note.slice(0,100)}}];}if(cmd==='/gh_report'){const n=args.trim().match(/^\d+$/)?parseInt(args.trim()):5;const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;const body={task_type:'gh_report',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{n}};return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:`📊 Report queued — Claudis will synthesize the last ${n} sessions.`}}];}if(cmd==='/diagnose'){const url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;let body,confirmText;if(args.trim()==='full'){body={task_type:'self_diagnostic',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'full'}};confirmText='🔬 Full diagnostic queued (5 categories) — report in ~5 min.';}else if(args.trim().startsWith('schedule')){const freq=args.trim().split(' ')[1]||'';body={task_type:'self_diagnostic',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'schedule',frequency:freq}};confirmText='⚙️ Diagnostic schedule set to: '+(freq||'(cleared)');}else{body={task_type:'self_diagnostic',status:'pending',priority:1,created_by:'bill',input_data:{mode:'quick'}};confirmText='🩺 Quick diagnostic queued — report in ~2 min.';}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];}if(!args.trim()){const usage={'/directive':'<instruction>','/task':'<description>'};return[{json:{url:null,body:null,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:`⚠️ Usage: ${cmd} ${usage[cmd]||'<text>'}`}}];}let url,body,confirmText;if(cmd==='/directive'){url=`${SBURL}/directives`;body={content:args,priority:3,source:'bill',status:'active',active:true};confirmText=`📌 Directive recorded:
"${args.slice(0,120)}"`;} else if(cmd==='/task'){url=`${SBURL}/work_queue`;body={task_type:'general_task',status:'pending',priority:2,created_by:'bill',input_data:{request:args,source:'telegram'}};confirmText=`✅ Task queued:
"${args.slice(0,120)}"`;}return[{json:{url,body,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText}}];

const pc=$('Parse Command').item.json;const cmd=pc.command;const idPrefix=pc.id_prefix||'';const replyMsg=pc.reply_msg||'';const chatId=pc.chat_id;const SBURL='https://cihbfubghytzqrpffgcq.supabase.co/rest/v1';const now=new Date().toISOString();if(!idPrefix){const usage={'/approve':'<id>','/deny':'<id>','/reply':'<id> <message>'};return[{json:{url:null,patch_body:null,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:`\u26a0\ufe0f Usage: ${cmd} ${usage[cmd]||'<id>'}`,needs_wq:false,wq_body:null}}];}const url=`${SBURL}/inbox?id=like.${idPrefix}%25`;let patchBody,confirmText,needsWq=false,wqBody=null;if(cmd==='/approve'){patchBody={status:'approved',responded_at:now};confirmText=`\u2705 Approved (${idPrefix}).\nQueued for next Sentinel wake.`;needsWq=true;wqBody={task_type:'approved_action',status:'pending',priority:3,input_data:{inbox_id_prefix:idPrefix,source:'bill_approval',note:'Execute approved inbox item on next wake'}};}else if(cmd==='/deny'){patchBody={status:'denied',responded_at:now};confirmText=`\u274c Denied (${idPrefix}).`;}else if(cmd==='/reply'){if(!replyMsg)return[{json:{url:null,patch_body:null,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:'\u26a0\ufe0f Usage: /reply <id> <message>',needs_wq:false,wq_body:null}}];patchBody={status:'replied',bill_reply:replyMsg,responded_at:now};confirmText=`\ud83d\udcac Reply delivered (${idPrefix}).`;}return[{json:{url,patch_body:patchBody,chat_id:chatId,confirm_text:confirmText,needs_wq:needsWq,wq_body:wqBody}}];
